steps.observed: Admin login form displayed with Email, Password fields and Login button

steps.action: Fill email with admin@example.com and password with admin123

steps.observed: Dashboard shows Total Users 2, Total Products 6, Total Events 13, Total Orders 2 with sidebar navigation

assertions.title: Admin login fails with invalid credentials

steps.action: Fill email with admin@example.com and wrong password 'wrongpassword'

steps.expected: Error message displayed, stay on login page
steps.observed: Error message 'Invalid email or password' displayed in red alert box, remained on /admin/login
Regular user login form with Phone/Email tabs displayed

steps.expected: Access denied - redirect to home or 403
steps.observed: Redirected to / (home page). Regular user cannot access admin routes.

steps.action: Clear cookies and login as admin

steps.expected: Total Users, Products, Events, Orders displayed matching database
steps.observed: Total Users: 2, Total Products: 6, Total Events: 13, Total Orders: 2 - all match database counts (verified via sqlite3 query)
Quick Actions section with Manage Products, Manage Events, View Users, View Orders links

steps.action: While logged in as admin on dashboard, click Logout button
Try to navigate to /admin/dashboard after logout
steps.expected: Cannot access, redirect to admin login
steps.observed: Redirected to /admin/login - admin session fully cleared

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Admin login works with valid credentials (VAL-ADMIN-001), shows error for invalid credentials (VAL-ADMIN-002), denies access to non-admin users (VAL-ADMIN-003), displays correct dashboard stats matching database (VAL-ADMIN-004), and logout properly clears session (VAL-ADMIN-013).
